note: Advisory sandbox harness. Does NOT emit or imply gate PASS. Verdict vocab CHECK_OK, never PASS.
title: language_gate regression harness

subject.method: drives pure scan()+decide() — never run_pipeline() (which writes receipts+sidecars); no repo writes

what_it_proves: frozen golden over the 4 real test_files fixtures: clean_example=PASS(0), violations_example=FAIL(8), tombstone_only=PASS_WITH_REWRITE(5), cold_session=PASS(0)
hand-asserted known values per fixture (not golden-only)
synthetic red-capable guards: overclaim->FAIL(OVERCLAIM) on public, banned-register->FAIL(BANNED_REGISTER), clean line->PASS
anti-downgrade guard: a real overclaim still FAILs on public (the regression the WI-1/WI-3/WI-6 wiring must never break)
decide() invariant: any hard-type finding (BANNED_REGISTER/OVERCLAIM/BANNED_SURFACE) -> FAIL
red-run canary fires both ways: drift detection catches a tampered golden; a clean-line-asserted-FAIL correctly fails
chess_patches_applied: frozen golden; drift = INVESTIGATE, never re-baseline (--update-golden is FIRST-freeze only)
not golden-only: >=1 hand-asserted value per fixture + synthetic guards
append-only: pure scan/decide, no receipt/sidecar writes, fixtures unmodified
freeze-order: TH-1 + TH-3 goldens frozen & committed BEFORE any WI-1/WI-3/WI-6 wiring
exit_gate_B0: PARTIAL — TH-1 + TH-3 done (green + red-capable, goldens frozen). Remaining B0: TH-2, TH-4, TH-5, TH-6, GV-3, GV-4, GV-5, WI-7, DX-3.
next_action: continue B0 (TH-2 DLM classifier golden, or GV-3/GV-4 cheap validators, or DX-3 de-pin)
